step_rationale: Decreased plasmalogen phosphatidylethanolamine predicts post-MI mortality; myocardial oxidative stress and injury marker.
mechanism: Decreased plasmalogen lipid content post-MI reflects oxidative damage to myocardial membranes and cardiomyocyte injury severity.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
